description_long: This is a compact, rectangular bookcase with a minimalist, modern design, featuring three evenly spaced horizontal shelves supported by four slender vertical legs. The entire structure is finished in a uniform matte black color, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The shelves are flat and open, with no backing or side panels, allowing for easy access from the front and sides. The legs are straight and extend slightly above the top shelf, providing a subtle frame around the upper surface. The bookcase is constructed from what appears to be metal, likely steel, which contributes to its sturdy and durable build. Its open design makes it suitable for displaying books, decorative items, or small storage bins in urban environments such as offices, apartments, or public waiting areas.
description: A sleek, matte black metal bookcase with three open shelves and a minimalist, modern design. Its open frame and sturdy construction make it ideal for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three shelves clearly, with the open frame and vertical supports visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the straight, slender legs.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the open back and shelf arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the shelf depth and open structure.
